positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial portrait of a meditating astronaut floating in deep space. The astronaut is rendered in clean, smooth lines with contrasting metallic white and burnt orange accents on the suit. Surrounding the astronaut are detailed, bioluminescent nebulae and stylized cosmic flora, forming a strong symmetrical composition. The overall style is neo-retro sci-fi illustration with thick, punchy outlines and saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, deep purple, electric turquoise, gold). The central figure must be perfectly centered, emphasizing a strong, powerful silhouette against a gradient cosmic background. High contrast, vector art aesthetics, perfect for T-shirt print.
negative: blurry, artifact, grainy, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, noise, poorly drawn, multiple subjects, extra limbs, mutated hands, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped
